error_signature: Null output from JSON input into MongoDB
title: Null output when inserting JSON into MongoDB
symptom: The MongoDB node is returning null values when attempting to insert data from a JSON input. This results in no data being stored in the database.
not_this_if: Data is correctly formatted and inserted without nulls
root_cause: The issue arises because the MongoDB node is not correctly referencing the fields from the JSON input. Instead of passing the field names and values correctly, it is compiling them into a text string, which leads to null outputs.
fix_steps: Ensure that you are only referencing the field names without concatenating them into a string
Use the correct JSON structure for the input
Test the workflow again to confirm data is inserted correctly
agent_instruction: Correctly reference the fields in the MongoDB node without compiling them into a text string.
